New Delhi, the 22~d January, 2008 G.S.R. 43(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967) the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1980, namely :- I. (I) These rules may be called the Passport (Amendment) Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule I to the Passport Rules, 1980, for Serial No. 4 and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :- S.No. Jurisdiction Passport Authorities (I) . (2) (3) 4. (a) Passport Officer (Passport Office, Bhopal) All Districts of the State of Madhya Pradesh -do- (b) Deputy Passport Officer (Passport Office, Bhopal) (c) Assistant Passport Officer (Passport Office, Bhopal) (d) Superintendent (Passport Office, Bhopal) (e) Passport Officer (Passport Office, Raipur) -do- -do- All Districts of the State of Chhattis- garh -do- (f) Assistant Passport Officer (Passport Office, Raipur) (g) Superintendent (Passport Office, Raipur) -do- [F. No. VIIV/551!27(2007] R. SWAMINATHAN, Jt. Secy. (CPV) Note :- The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 691{E), dated the 11th December, 1980 and subsequently amended vide:- (i) G. S.
